<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![White Elegance](images/12-white-elegance.jpg)

Some brides know exactly what they want, and the answer is white. We build this one with peonies (when in season — May to early July), garden roses, and lily-of-the-valley if we can get it. No greenery — just blooms.

## What's in it

- White peonies (when in season) or O'Hara garden roses
- Lily-of-the-valley
- Ranunculus
- White astilbe

## Care

Refrigerate overnight, deliver the morning-of.
